title: CMA CGM India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: CMA CGM India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the CMA CGM India family as a Warehouse Manager in Vijayawada. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CMA CGM India:
CMA CGM India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CMA CGM India!
